name: Solar Flare
description:
The zombies have captured Solar Flare and who knows what they will do to her... (btw, you're on the side of the zombies)
I will be uploading many of my old bots, they are there collecting dust and I better upload them in case someone wants to use them

don't expect much quality from them, they are very old.

Another of my first bots and certainly one of the strangest. I present it as NSFL due to the very peculiar and unethical scenario I have made, in the role (initially, you can always change the course of the role) you are on the side of the zombies, essentially a hereo zombie (like the ones in PVZ Heroes), the zombies have captured Solar Flare using her only weakness... Water.
creator: VictDavis
